datasets.name: ds_route_otp_summary
datasets.query:
SELECT
  service_date,
  route_id,
  direction_id,
  ROUND(AVG(pct_on_time) * 100, 1)                          AS otp_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_delay_seconds) / 60.0, 2)                   AS avg_delay_min,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(p90_delay_seconds, 0.9) / 60.0, 2) AS p90_delay_min,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_late_start_seconds) / 60.0, 2)              AS avg_late_start_min,
  SUM(trip_count)                                           AS total_trips
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_route_metrics_15min
WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
GROUP BY service_date, route_id, direction_id
ORDER BY service_date DESC, otp_pct ASC

datasets.name: ds_otp_by_hour
datasets.displayName: OTP by Hour of Day (last 7 days)
datasets.query:
SELECT
  route_id,
  direction_id,
  MOD(HOUR(time_bucket_15min) - 7 + 24, 24)  AS phoenix_hour,
  ROUND(AVG(pct_on_time) * 100, 1)           AS otp_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_delay_seconds) / 60.0, 2)   AS avg_delay_min,
  SUM(trip_count)                            AS trip_count
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_route_metrics_15min
WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
GROUP BY route_id, direction_id, MOD(HOUR(time_bucket_15min) - 7 + 24, 24)
ORDER BY route_id, phoenix_hour

datasets.name: ds_otp_trend
datasets.query:
SELECT
  service_date,
  ROUND(AVG(pct_on_time) * 100, 1)         AS system_otp_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_delay_seconds) / 60.0, 2)  AS system_avg_delay_min,
  SUM(trip_count)                          AS total_trips
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_route_metrics_15min
WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
GROUP BY service_date
ORDER BY service_date

datasets.name: ds_worst_routes
datasets.query:
SELECT
  route_id,
  ROUND(AVG(pct_on_time) * 100, 1)              AS avg_otp_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_delay_seconds) / 60.0, 2)       AS avg_delay_min,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_late_start_seconds) / 60.0, 2)  AS avg_late_start_min,
  SUM(trip_count)                               AS total_trips
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_route_metrics_15min
WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
GROUP BY route_id
HAVING total_trips >= 10
ORDER BY avg_otp_pct ASC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_delay_heatmap
datasets.displayName: Delay Heatmap (route x hour, last 7 days)
datasets.query:
SELECT
  route_id,
  MOD(HOUR(time_bucket_15min) - 7 + 24, 24)  AS phoenix_hour,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_delay_seconds) / 60.0, 2)   AS avg_delay_min,
  ROUND(AVG(pct_on_time) * 100, 1)          AS otp_pct
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_route_metrics_15min
WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
GROUP BY route_id, MOD(HOUR(time_bucket_15min) - 7 + 24, 24)
ORDER BY route_id, phoenix_hour

widget.name: txt_otp_header
widget.textbox_spec:
## Route On-Time Performance

FTA standard: on-time = [-60s early, +299s late]. Hours shown in Phoenix local (UTC-7).

**Suggested visualizations:**
- `ds_otp_trend` → Line chart: x=`service_date`, y=`system_otp_pct` + `system_avg_delay_min`
- `ds_worst_routes` → Bar chart: x=`route_id`, y=`avg_otp_pct`
- `ds_worst_routes` → Table (detail)
- `ds_delay_heatmap` → Heatmap: x=`phoenix_hour`, y=`route_id`, color=`avg_delay_min`
- `ds_otp_by_hour` → Line chart: x=`phoenix_hour`, y=`otp_pct`, series=`route_id`
- `ds_route_otp_summary` → Table (drill-down)
